name_en: 。💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the interlocking Double G motif adds a touch of elegance to leather accessories. On this light pink leather card case, this 1970s-style motif radiates charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
name_cn:
。💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】Inspired by the brand's heritage, the interlocking Double G motif adds a touch of elegance to leather accessories. On this light pink leather card case, this 1970s-style motif radiates charm. The interior is thoughtfully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
Light pink leather
Taffeta lining
Enamel interlocking Double G details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795.
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Light pink full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
